testcase.name: test_07_patch_pool_picker_rule_update_allowed_pools
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_pool_picker_rules.py:162: in test_07_patch_pool_picker_rule_update_allowed_pools assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to update rule: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to update rule: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
